subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Pilgrimage has to do with one's soul and, depending on one's approach, one benefits accordingly. If one was to approach pilgrimage with the utmost devotion and consecration
subcodes.first_line_orig: زیارت در وجود خود انسان است تا چقدر فیض ببرد و استفاده کند اگر بکمال توجه و تضرع زیارت نمود
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @poems and quotation from poetry, @development of capacity and readiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
